chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months

text: 2949 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ أَيُّ اَلْعُمْرَةِ أَفْضَلُ عُمْرَةٌ فِي رَجَبٍ أَوْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَلْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَجَبٍ أَفْضَلُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2949 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked:
"Which Umrah is better, an Umrah in the month of Rajab or an Umrah in the Month of Ramadan?"
Imam (as) said: "No, an Umrah in the month of Rajab is better."
